The sample has no network activity, but it has created 7 registry persistence keys and 2 processes. It also made a highlighted API call to SetWindowsHookExA. I should investigate the registry changes

The sample has created registry persistence keys for several system executables, including ZhuDongFangYu.exe, 360tray.exe, and taskmgr.exe, and has also modified file associations for comfile, jpgfile

The sample does not appear to have dropped any files, which suggests that it may be a low-impact malware that does not require any additional components to function. The highlighted API call to SetWin
